service_list.brief: Repair, clean, and repaint roofs to extend roof life and improve the property's appearance.

service_list.name: Roof Repointing
service_list.brief: Strengthen and seal roofs to help prevent leaks and maintain structural integrity.

service_list.name: Roof Inspections

service_list.name: Guttering & Downpipes

service_list.name: Roof Cleaning
service_list.brief: Remove moss and debris to keep roofs looking good and reduce long-term damage.

key_messaging: Feel Safe Under a Roof That Lasts

options.h1: Brisbane Roof Repairs & Restorations Backed by a 10-Year Guarantee
options.subhead: From urgent leak repairs to full roof restorations, Ace Roofing Services helps protect homes and businesses with licensed, insured roofing work.

options.h1: Feel Safe Under a Roof Built to Last
options.subhead: Family-owned since 2004, we handle roof restorations, leaks, repointing, inspections, guttering, and cleaning across Brisbane.

options.h1: Fast, Professional Roofing Help When Your Roof Needs Attention
options.subhead: Get a clear quote from experienced Brisbane roofers offering repairs, restorations, and emergency roofing support.

items.name: Roof Restoration
items.description: Refresh and protect your roof with a complete restoration that repairs damage, cleans the surface, and repaints it for longer life and better street appeal.

items.name: Roof Leak Repairs
items.description: Stop leaks before they spread with fast diagnosis and practical repairs for minor leaks, storm damage, and structural roof issues.

items.name: Roof Repointing
items.description: Restore ridge capping strength and weather protection with professional repointing that helps prevent water entry and roof movement.

items.name: Roof Inspections
items.description: Find roof problems early with a detailed inspection that gives you a clearer picture before small issues become expensive repairs.

items.name: Guttering & Downpipes
items.description: Keep rainwater moving away from your home with guttering and downpipe services designed to reduce overflow, leaks, and water damage.

items.name: Roof Cleaning
items.description: Remove moss, debris, and buildup to improve your roof’s appearance and reduce avoidable long-term wear.
Ace Roofing Services provides Brisbane roof restorations, leak repairs, repointing, inspections, guttering, and roof cleaning, backed by 20 years of experience.
Request a free quote from Ace Roofing Services for Brisbane roof repairs, restorations, inspections, guttering, and emergency roofing needs.

brief.redesign_brief: Keep the strongest existing proof points: family-owned since 2004, licensed and insured roofers, 20 years of expertise, 10-year written guarantee, emergency availability, and the clear roofing service list. Improve the site by fixing the vague and awkward hero copy, making the phone number fully visible, adding missing address/email/licence details, using stronger real project imagery, clarifying the quote flow, and separating services into scan-friendly sections. The redesign matters because roofing customers are often urgent, risk-aware, and comparing trust quickly, so the page needs to make credibility, service coverage, and next action obvious in the first few seconds.

ready_to_build_concerns: Phone number is masked in the scrape and cannot be verified as a complete AU mobile number.
No ABN, QBCC, or licence number found.
No real testimonials found despite a customer satisfaction section.
No owner name or team member details found.
Quote/contact section appears truncated in the scrape.
Primary and accent colours could not be reliably extracted from the provided CSS excerpt.
Font family could not be reliably extracted from the provided font metadata.
Crawled URLs are mostly duplicate homepage anchors rather than separate content pages.
